title: Across the street

stages.narration: A figure keeping to the far wall, moving the way you move now — low, quick, checking corners. They clock you at the same moment you clock them. For a held breath, the whole street is the question of what each of you is.

choices.label: Show an empty hand, and pass
Head down, keep your line, give nothing
Let them see you're armed, so they keep off

notes: passing-stranger, social. A wordless human moment: peace costs nothing and steadies you; the neutral pass is free but taut; the threat display buys a little safety at the cost of what it makes you (Humanity). Human-only, no combat.
